predicted_caption: Huyé tita. Kíte meti. Kíte ramaru mewewiyak+. Ramaru huyétsie p+ma.
english_intermediate:
The sky is blue.
A road runs through a village.
The road is dirt.
Houses stand along the road.
The houses are made of brick.
A wall is on the left.
The wall is red.
A building is on the right.
Wood leans against the building.
A tree grows near the road.
The tree has green leaves.
A mountain rises in the background.
The mountain is brown.
Plants grow on the mountain.
Power lines cross the sky.
Stones lie on the ground.
The ground is dry.
back_translation: The road runs. The houses stand. The houses made the building. The building is on the road.
target_caption: Kiekari mukumarix+a hipat+ muyu wewiet+we me pikamana ri, hik+ turukitsixi me wa in+atat+ tit+ reu miet+ huyé m+ni tá há x+a.
